confirmed.note: HandleListMobs/HandleListObjects/HandleListRooms/HandleListTriggers are 4 near-identical clones (parse zone_vnum -> GetZoneRnum -> error-check -> iterate proto table -> build json -> push_back -> SendJsonResponse); HandleUpdateZone/Object/Room share the same try/json::parse/catch(parse_error)/catch(exception) skeleton. AI-generated 32-CRUD-handler family, only the per-entity iteration body differs.

Hybrid commit re-implements admin_api_list_mobs/objects/rooms/triggers (+get/update variants) inline in admin_api.cpp duplicating the same handlers that live in crud_handlers.cpp module (admin_api_list_objects vs HandleListObjects are line-for-line the same skeleton with renamed send helpers). Also within-file: the 4 list_* handlers are clones of each other.

LoadRoomTriggers (1067-1093) and LoadMobTriggers (1398-1430) are near-identical: same SQL except entity_type 'room'/'mob', same prepare/step/find-in-vnum_to_rnum/proto_script make_shared/push_back/finalize; only world[] vs mob_proto[] target differs. Same Load* prepare/step/finalize loop body is copy-pasted across the LoadZone*/LoadRoom*/LoadMob*/LoadObject* family.

false_positives.where: src/engine/.../tracing Span::SetAttribute overloads (also recurs in 5685a54 OtelSpan::SetAttribute 664/670/676)
false_positives.what_happened: C++ overload set: SetAttribute(string,string)/(string,int64_t)/(string,double) have byte-identical 3-line bodies 'if (m_span) { m_span->SetAttribute(key, value); }'. After identifier/type normalization the detector sees 3 identical clones, but the bodies are forced to be identical by the overload-forwarding idiom and cannot be deduped without changing the public typed API.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: add an overload-set suppressor — when two clone blocks belong to functions with the SAME qualified name but DIFFERENT parameter type lists (C++ overloads), drop the pair; or require >=2 distinct non-signature tokens between candidates before flagging short (<=4 line) bodies.

false_positives.where: src/engine/... 824 snprintf(buf, sizeof(buf), "...", ...) sites across 34 files
false_positives.what_happened: Bulk replacement of deprecated C string funcs with safe analogs introduced 824 occurrences of the normalized shape 'snprintf(IDENT, sizeof(IDENT), STR, ...)'. With identifier normalization these collapse to one canonical 1-line token sequence repeated everywhere, producing a swarm of cross-file 'clones' that are really one shared safe-string idiom mechanically applied.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: enforce a minimum-distinct-line threshold (>=3 non-idiom lines) for a clone block, and maintain an idiom denylist of single-statement library wrappers (snprintf/sizeof, sqlite3 prepare/step/finalize, smart-ptr make_shared guards) that are excluded from clone seeding.
